DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_INBOUND_KILL_REASON]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_INBOUND_KILL_REASON]
( 
	[InboundKillReasonID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[InboundKillReason] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_InboundKillReasonID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
